APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANTONIJA BORIC'S APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES. APPLICANT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT APPLICANT'S INCOME IS SUFFICIENT TO PAY THE NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ANTONIJA BORIC HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ROBERT L.
